title: Lockbox
description: Protect your stuff in the clunkiest way possible!
body:
Created as a part of [this video](https://youtu.be/bzXLt6AN6t8).

Lockbox lets you protect your stuff by building a box around it. Simple stuff!

Build a Frame around what you want to protect, activate a Lockbox Core, and rejoice as all your things are protected from harm and interference.

Based on a suggestion by LordDerp at http://dc.blur.lol
